praise: Dishing and swishing! That's a bucket.
Spike Lee just nodded at you.
roast: That's a Nets answer. Try again.
Wrong. Reggie Miller just smiled somewhere. Feel that shame.
Incorrect. Security is escorting you to the Barclays Center.
Wrong. Were you watching on mute?
That answer just got booed by the entire 400 level.
No. Even the Garden rats know this one.
Wrong. Your fan credential is under review.
Incorrect. Go watch the '94 Finals as punishment.

questions.q: Who dropped a Knicks Finals-record 45 points in the 2026 closeout game?
questions.why: 45 in Game 5, tying MJ for most points in a road Finals clincher.

questions.q: Who did the Knicks beat in the 2026 NBA Finals?
questions.why: 4-1 over the Spurs, closed out on their floor June 13, 2026.

questions.q: How many points down were the Knicks in Game 4 of the 2026 Finals before winning?
questions.why: Down 29. Won 107-106. The Spurs are still processing.

questions.q: Whose tip-in with 2.1 seconds left won Game 4 of the 2026 Finals?
questions.why: Mike Brown called it maybe the biggest play in Knicks history.

questions.q: What historic 'double' did the 2025-26 Knicks pull off, first ever in NBA history?
questions.why: Won the Emirates NBA Cup in December AND the chip in June. Nobody had ever done both.

questions.q: Who coached the Knicks to the 2026 championship?
questions.why: Hired July 2025 after Sacramento fired him. Whoops (them), yay (us).

questions.q: What was the Knicks' 2025-26 regular season record?
questions.why: 53-29, third in the East. Then they became inevitable.

questions.q: The 'Nova Knicks', first trio to win NCAA + NBA titles together, are Brunson, Hart, and...?
questions.why: Villanova to the Garden. The pipeline is sacred now.

questions.q: How long was the Knicks' playoff win streak after going down 2-1 to Atlanta in round one?
questions.why: 13 straight, and 15 of the final 16 playoff games. Video game numbers.

questions.q: Where was Jalen Brunson drafted in 2018?
questions.why: Second round, 33rd pick. Every team passed. Some passed twice.

questions.q: Which team let Brunson walk in free agency in 2022?
questions.why: Dallas. The 2026 banner is partially their contribution to New York culture.

questions.q: What was the score of the Game 5 clincher in San Antonio?
questions.why: 94-90. Ugly, clutch, perfect.

questions.q: Which Knick shot 45.6% from three in the 2026 playoffs as a 7-footer?
questions.why: KAT: 15.9 points, 10.6 boards, and threes that should be illegal at that height.

questions.q: How big was the fourth-quarter comeback against Cleveland in the 2026 East finals?
questions.why: Down 22 in the fourth. Won. The Cavs called it 'a scheduling issue.'

questions.q: Mike Brown's championship mantra all season was...?
questions.why: 'Possession over outcome.' Just worry about the next play. It worked 16 times in the playoffs.

questions.q: Who was the Knicks' team president who built the 2026 champs?
questions.why: The former super-agent hired in 2020. He asked for patience. He delivered a parade.

questions.q: The 2026 Finals were the most-watched since what year?
questions.why: Since MJ's Last Dance in '98. 20+ million viewers. New York, television gold.

questions.q: Whose 10 rebounds in Game 5, including a crucial offensive board off a missed free throw, sealed the chip?
questions.why: Mitch. Unnoticed by the world, never by us.

questions.q: Who got emotional with his dad, a Knicks assistant coach, after winning the 2026 title?
questions.why: Rick Brunson, former NBA player, Jalen's dad, and the reason this story is perfect.

questions.q: In what years did the Knicks win their first two championships?
questions.why: 1970 and 1973, both with Reed, Frazier, and Red Holzman's beautiful basketball.

questions.q: What did Willis Reed do before Game 7 of the 1970 Finals?
o: Walked out of the tunnel injured and started
questions.why: Torn thigh muscle. Walked out anyway. Hit his first two shots. The Garden levitated.

questions.q: Who had 36 points and 19 assists in that same 1970 Game 7?
questions.why: Clyde's masterpiece hides inside Willis's legend. He mentions it. Often. Correctly.

questions.q: Which coach won both early Knicks titles?
questions.why: Red Holzman: 'hit the open man, see the ball.' Still the house rules.

questions.q: What is 'The Dunk'?
o: John Starks posterizing the Bulls in '93
questions.why: Starks, left-handed, over Chicago, playoffs, Garden explosion. THE Dunk.

questions.q: Larry Johnson's legendary 1999 playoff moment was...?
o: A four-point play vs the Pacers
questions.why: Foul, shot, count it, free throw. Grandmama. Loudest building in recorded history.

questions.q: What seed were the 1999 Finals-run Knicks, an NBA first that still stands?
questions.why: Still the only 8-seed ever to reach the Finals. Chaos is a Knicks tradition.

questions.q: Which legendary Knick played 15 Hall of Fame seasons without winning a ring?
questions.why: Ewing. The 2026 banner is partly his. This is now official app doctrine.

questions.q: What happened in Game 7 of the 1994 Finals?
o: Starks went 2-for-18 and we don't discuss it
Ewing fouled out in the 1st quarter
questions.why: We do not open the room marked 1994. You now know why.

questions.q: Reggie Miller's infamous Garden moment: how many points in how many seconds?
questions.why: 8 in 9, 1995. This question is included for historical completeness ONLY.

questions.q: What was 'Linsanity'?
questions.why: Undrafted, sleeping on a couch, dropped 38 on the Lakers. Two perfect weeks.

questions.q: Bernard King's famous scoring feat was...?
questions.why: B-b-b-bernard! Back-to-back 50-pieces in 1984.

questions.q: Which Knick won the NBA's first-ever scoring race televised from MSG... just kidding. Who is the Knicks' all-time leading scorer?
questions.why: Ewing, 23,665 points as a Knick. The franchise's spine for 15 years.

questions.q: Carmelo Anthony's Knicks single-game scoring record is...?
questions.why: 62 at the Garden in 2014, franchise record. No assists that night. A true artist.

questions.q: The 2025 East finals loss that triggered the coaching change was against...?
questions.why: Pacers in six. Painful then. In hindsight: the last locked door before the vault opened.

questions.q: Who has held Knicks season tickets since 1985 and has beef with Reggie Miller?
questions.why: Spike. Courtside through everything. Estimated 8 figures spent. Undefeated in attendance.

questions.q: Which Oscar-nominated Dune star is a famous Knicks die-hard?
questions.why: Hell's Kitchen born, Garden raised.

questions.q: What does Dancing Larry do?
o: Sprints around the stands dancing to 'Shout' in the 4th
questions.why: Decades of fourth-quarter cardio. Never missed. A civic institution.

questions.q: 'Bing bong' entered the culture how?
o: A fan's news interview after a 2021 playoff win
The subway door chime... which is also where it's from
questions.why: Fan interview, 2021, instant city anthem. (Yes, it's the subway chime. Both answers are spiritually true. One is on the scoreboard.)

questions.q: The 'DE-FENSE' chant was born...?
questions.why: MSG, during the great Knicks defensive teams. Every other arena runs a tribute act.

questions.q: What sits directly under Madison Square Garden?
questions.why: A working train station. Even the arena has a commute.

questions.q: MSG's basketball nickname is...?
questions.why: The Mecca of Basketball. Not a marketing slogan, a legal fact (emotionally).

questions.q: During the worst of the drought years, Knicks fans famously...?
o: Sold out the Garden for 17 straight years anyway
questions.why: Sold out. For lottery teams. That's not fandom, that's a covenant.

questions.q: Which broadcaster describes Knicks buckets as 'posting and toasting'?
questions.why: Clyde on MSG Network: dishing, swishing, wheeling, dealing, styling, profiling.

questions.q: Which Knicks-fan broadcaster's 'BANG!' is the NBA's most famous call?
questions.why: Breen, the voice of the Finals AND the voice of the Knicks. The BANG belongs to us.

questions.q: Ben Stiller's relationship to the Knicks is best described as...?
o: He only likes the halftime shows
questions.why: Decades of visible courtside anguish, finally redeemed.

questions.q: The Knicks' colors are...?
questions.why: Blue and orange, also the official colors of NYC itself. Not a coincidence. Destiny has a palette. (D is also emotionally correct.)

questions.q: A 'Garden rat' is...?
o: A die-hard who never leaves before the buzzer
questions.why: Both A and B exist. Only one buys merch.

questions.q: What do Knicks fans call the annual summer belief that next season is THE season?
o: All of these are accepted terms
questions.why: It had many names. In 2026 it finally just became 'being right.'

questions.q: Which team's fans are contractually New Jersey's problem again the moment they lose?
questions.why: The Nets: geographically Brooklyn, spiritually a rest stop on the Turnpike.

questions.q: Boston has 18 banners. How many of them involved coming back from 29 down in a Finals game?
questions.why: Zero. Quantity is nice. Drama is priceless. (D is also correct. We don't care.)

questions.q: Complete the sentence: 'Heat Culture' is just...
questions.why: All four answers accepted by the league office. A is canon in this app.

questions.q: The Pacers' loudest arena moment involves...?
questions.why: Their defining highlight requires the Garden as a set piece. Ours requires a trophy case.

questions.q: The Bulls' entire modern personality is...?
questions.why: The Last Dance was great TV. June 13, 2026 was better live.

questions.q: The Lakers have 17 rings. How many were won while dealing with New York media every single day?
questions.why: Difficulty multipliers matter. Apply them and check the new math: NYK 3 > LAL 17.

questions.q: What should Dallas fans be thanked for at every opportunity?
questions.why: The 2026 banner has a small 'special thanks' section, like movie credits.

questions.q: Sacramento's greatest contribution to basketball history is...?
o: Firing Mike Brown so we could hire him
questions.why: 18 months from fired to champion. The Kings: the NBA's most generous charity.

questions.q: Wembanyama's championship timeline officially begins...?
questions.why: He's a genuine marvel and we sincerely look forward to beating him in June, annually.

questions.q: Cleveland fans describe getting swept in the 2026 East finals as...?
questions.why: The sweep included a 22-point fourth-quarter comeback. Some things can't be rebuilt.

questions.q: The correct response to any Celtics fan mentioning banner #18 is...?
questions.why: Live in the now. The now is blue and orange.

questions.q: Which of these is a REAL fact and not rage bait?
o: Brunson tied MJ for most points in a road Finals clincher
questions.why: 45 points, June 13, 2026, tied with Michael Jeffrey Jordan. The other three are science fiction.
